driver: SMOKE_V4 R3 (2026-05-19) revealed Gemini v7.1 dropped to 13/17 (4 FAIL). v1.2 replaces Gemini system_prompt v7.1 → v8.1 (4-prong fix + 6 reviewer fix). KB unchanged from v1.1; other 3 platforms inherit byte-identical.

gemini.uploads_status: byte-identical inherit from v1.1 (KB has not been modified since v1.1)

v8_1_4_prong_fix.CO-4_entry_guard: biospecimen 关键词 (13 中英 patterns) → BE/BS/RELSPEC, 禁 AE/CM fallback (modify Q3 fail)
v8_1_4_prong_fix.CO-2f_file_format_ground_rule: XPT/Dataset-JSON/Define-XML 题 → ground CDISC published spec, 禁替换 SDTM domain content (modify Q11 fail)
v8_1_4_prong_fix.CO-1e_IS_scope_shift: anti-microbial antibody → IS regardless of timing (HIV Ag/Ab combo exemption → MB); sticky anchor (modify Q4-A regression fail)
v8_1_4_prong_fix.CO-5_default_reflection: regex `^[A-Z]{2,5}[A-Z0-9]{0,12}$` triggers KB double-check, independent of question phrasing; 否定清单 + CO-2f priority gate (modify AHP1 fail)

v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.H1_factual_HIV_to_MB: HIV Ag/Ab combination → MB (not LB), per KB IS Assumption 5
v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.H2_arch_co2f_priority: CO-2f file-format anchor priority over CO-5 regex variable-hallucination path
v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.M1_regex_negation_list: Common non-SDTM acronyms (FDA/USA/NCI/EVS/CDISC/ADaM/SDTM/XPT/XML/JSON/SAS/EDC/CRF/RWD/ADAE/ADSL/ADTTE) + SDTM domain abbreviations skip KB double-check
v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.M2_candidate_cap: When ≥ 5 candidates appear in a question, only explicitly named 3-5 run double-check
v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.L1_assumption_8: ISTSTOPO cited as IS Assumption 8 (was previously labeled 7a)
v8_1_reviewer_reconcile.L2_becat_extraction_note: BECAT example EXTRACTION annotated as sponsor-extensible (KB BE/spec L111 inlines only COLLECTION/PREPARATION/TRANSPORT)

verification.smoke_v4_r3_summary: Claude 17/17 + ChatGPT 17/17 + NotebookLM 15.5/17 + Gemini v7.1 13/17 (4 FAIL: Q3/Q4-A/Q11/AHP1)
verification.v8_1_dry_run_summary: Gemini 3.1 Pro 4/4 PASS on Q3/Q4/Q11/AHP1 (same model as R3 baseline)
verification.writer_reviewer: pr-review-toolkit:code-reviewer (Rule D #16) — PASS_WITH_OBSERVATIONS, 6 reconcile fixes applied (v8.0 → v8.1)
verification.kb_grep_verified: BE/spec L111 BECAT examples + BS/spec L84 BSTESTCD VOLUME/RIN C124300 + IS/assumptions §2/§5/§8 exact + LBCLINSIG absent KB + LBCLSIG L410 C66742 + LBNRIND C78736

metadata_docs_with_v1_2_reconcile: KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.{en,zh,ja}.md (§0 updated: R3 results + v8.1 verification + post-v1.2 deferred items)
CHANGELOG.{md,en,zh,ja}.md (v1.2 entry added; v1.1 entry retroactively added to web changelog)
unchanged_from_v1_1.system_prompts: Claude / ChatGPT / NotebookLM unchanged; only Gemini replaced

deferred_to_post_v1_2.r4_full_17_question_regression: Anti-cheating long-tail probe on Gemini v8.1; R3 13 PASS questions not yet tested under v8.1. Pro quota constraint requires staggered run.
deferred_to_post_v1_2.m2_candidate_cap_validation: M2 fix's threshold (candidates ≥ 5) was not exercised in the 4-question dry-run; needs multi-variable test question.
deferred_to_post_v1_2.becat_extraction_source_note: v8.1 prompt L272 lists 'EXTRACTION' among BECAT examples; KB BE/spec L111 inlines only 3 examples. Future prompt revision may add explicit source citation.
